mapper.select: select * from employee where name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from employee where name like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
select * from employee where id like concat(#{keyword}, '%') limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from employee where id like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
select * from employee where phone like concat(#{keyword}, '%') limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from employee where phone like concat(#{keyword}, '%')
select * from employee where sex = #{keyword} limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from employee where sex = #{keyword}
mapper.insert: insert into employee (name, id, address, mail, phone, qq, email, sex, political_status, birthday, nation, education, major, hobby, description, created_date) values (#{name}, #{id}, #{address}, #{mail}, #{phone}, #{QQ}, #{email}, #{sex}, #{political_status}, #{birthday}, #{nation}, #{education}, #{major}, #{hobby}, #{description}, now())
mapper.update: update employee set name = #{name}, id = #{id}, address = #{address}, mail = #{mail}, phone = #{phone}, qq = #{qq}, email = #{email}, sex = #{sex}, political_status = #{political_status}, birthday = #{birthday}, nation = #{nation}, education = #{education}, major = #{major}, hobby = #{hobby}, description = #{description} where no = #{no}
